title: Refactor the Report Generator
description: A single function fetches, transforms, and formats report data, then paginates the result — but it's hard to follow, and a hidden off-by-one error silently drops one item from every page. Refactor into focused functions and fix the pagination bug.
learning_objective: Single responsibility and edge-case thinking — separating distinct concerns into testable units, and recognizing that pagination boundaries are a common source of silent, hard-to-notice bugs.
